food_entries_has_food_or_recipe.name: food_entries_has_food_or_recipe
food_entries_has_food_or_recipe.value: "food_entries"."food_id" IS NOT NULL OR "food_entries"."recipe_id" IS NOT NULL

foods_optional_nutrition_nonnegative.name: foods_optional_nutrition_nonnegative
foods_optional_nutrition_nonnegative.value: ("foods"."sodium" IS NULL OR "foods"."sodium" >= 0) AND ("foods"."sugar" IS NULL OR "foods"."sugar" >= 0) AND ("foods"."saturated_fat" IS NULL OR "foods"."saturated_fat" >= 0) AND ("foods"."cholesterol" IS NULL OR "foods"."cholesterol" >= 0) AND ("foods"."vitamin_a" IS NULL OR "foods"."vitamin_a" >= 0) AND ("foods"."vitamin_c" IS NULL OR "foods"."vitamin_c" >= 0) AND ("foods"."calcium" IS NULL OR "foods"."calcium" >= 0) AND ("foods"."iron" IS NULL OR "foods"."iron" >= 0)

supplements_schedule_days_required.name: supplements_schedule_days_required
supplements_schedule_days_required.value: "supplements"."schedule_type" NOT IN ('weekly', 'specific_days') OR ("supplements"."schedule_days" IS NOT NULL AND array_length("supplements"."schedule_days", 1) > 0)

user_goals_optional_nonnegative.name: user_goals_optional_nonnegative
user_goals_optional_nonnegative.value: ("user_goals"."sodium_goal" IS NULL OR "user_goals"."sodium_goal" >= 0) AND ("user_goals"."sugar_goal" IS NULL OR "user_goals"."sugar_goal" >= 0)
